drop_files_support: Support for TXT, EPUB, SRT, and DOCX
drop_files_refine_support: Polish an existing translation — same language in, same language out
per_file_refine_after_title: Run a refinement pass on this file's output after translation
zone_locked: Drop area locked while the queue is in {{operation}} mode.
zone_locked_current: Queue is in {{current}} mode — clear it before switching.
batch_completed: ✅ Batch translation completed for all files!
batch_completed_log: 🏁 All files in the batch have been processed.
batch_paused_log: ⏸️ Batch processing paused (rate limited). Resume from the section below.
interrupt_before_clear_log: 🛑 Interrupting current translation before clearing files...
validation_custom_source: Please specify the custom source language for the batch.
validation_custom_target: Please specify the custom target language for the batch.
validation_model: Please select an LLM model for the batch.
validation_ollama_endpoint: Ollama API Endpoint cannot be empty for the batch.
critical_no_path_log: ❌ Critical Error: File {{name}} has no server path or content
file_duplicate: File '{{name}}' is already in the list.
file_uploaded_lang_not_in_list: File '{{name}}' ({{type}}) uploaded. Language detected but not in list: {{lang}}
no_file_uploaded_yet: No file uploaded yet. Upload a file to auto-detect its language.
file_no_path: File path not available for language detection.
lang_detected_not_in_list: Language detected but not in list: {{lang}}
lang_low_confidence: Low confidence detection: {{lang}} ({{confidence}}% confidence). Please select the source language manually.
lang_detection_no_result: Could not detect language from file content.
cannot_edit_file_processing: Cannot edit file '{{name}}' - it's already being processed.
translation_rate_limited_msg: ⏸️ {{name}}: Rate limited, translation auto-paused. Use the Resume button below when ready.
session_corrupted_log: Previous session state was corrupted, starting fresh
session_could_not_restore: Could not restore previous session, starting fresh
session_init_failed: Could not fully restore previous session state
session_job_missing_log: Translation job no longer exists, resetting
session_state_save_quota: Browser storage full, could not save translation state
cannot_resume_in_progress_title: ⚠️ Cannot resume: a translation is already in progress
cannot_resume_active: ⚠️ Cannot resume: a translation is already in progress ({{names}}). Please wait for it to finish or interrupt it.
confirm_resume: Do you want to resume this translation?
resume_success: ✅ Translation resumed successfully! Resuming from chunk {{chunk}}
confirm_delete_checkpoint:
Are you sure you want to delete this checkpoint?

This action is irreversible and you will lose all progress.
job_card_partial_title: Translation finished but {{count}} chunk(s) failed. Resume to retry them.
job_card_failed_title: {{count}} chunk(s) failed and will be retried on resume.
stat_fallbacks_tooltip: Phase 2 (token alignment) + Phase 3 (untranslated) chunks. Indicates the LLM struggled with placeholders.
fallback_panel_intro_critical: The LLM is struggling to preserve structural tags. After {{processed}} chunks: {{retryPct}}% needed retries, {{fallbackPct}}% fell back to alignment/untranslated mode (avg {{avgErrors}} placeholder errors per chunk). Consider stopping and adjusting one of:
fallback_panel_tip_plain_text_mode: Enable {{link}} — feeds the LLM near-plain text instead of marked-up content, for cleaner near error-free translations (trade-off: very limited formatting).
delete_uploaded_error_log: ⚠️ Error occurred while deleting uploaded files.
preferences_save_quota: Browser storage full, could not save preferences
